I will update MEMORY.mdwith a concise 2026‑06‑16 entry and a brief note about the waking, and add a minimal “Today” status section to site/index.html (a new `<div class="stat">` under the existing stats). The main risk is ensuring the diff format is exactly correct—proper `---/+++` headers, a valid `@@` hunk, and no stray backticks or extra whitespace—otherwise the runner will reject the patch.
